Global methane fluxes optimized with 
GOSAT data for 2010-2018 V1

Last Revised June 22, 2021

Goddard Earth Sciences Data and Information Services Center (GES DISC)
http://disc.gsfc.nasa.gov
NASA Goddard Space Flight Center 
Code 610.2 
Greenbelt, MD 20771 USA

 Table of Contents

2.0 Data Organization..................................................................................................................................3

3.0 GES DISC Data Services..........................................................................................................................3

2

 1.0 Introduction

The Global methane fluxes optimized with GOSAT data for 2010-2018 V1 consists of products 
generated for the Carbon Monitoring System (CMS) project.

Information about this dataset can be found on the dataset landing page 
doi:10.5067/FPKC6Q6SGWE0 and in Zhang et al. 2021.

2.0 Data Organization

This dataset consists of one netCDF file named GlobalInv_GOSAT_CH4Flux_2010-2018_v1.nc.

The non-wetland flux data is on a 4x5 degree grid with just one time step and the wetland emission 
data is for 14 different wetland regions with 108 time steps from January 2010 through December 
2018.
